about.bio: Rafael is a frontend developer with several years of experience building modern, fast, and enjoyable interfaces. He works daily with HTML5, CSS3, TypeScript, and frameworks like Vue and Angular. He values clean, well-structured code and the balance between performance and design. He also has experience with Node.js, Python, and MySQL, and holds certifications in Google Cloud Digital Leader and Microsoft Azure AZ-900. He previously worked as an audiovisual technician (video/audio signal management, streaming, video editing) from 2018 to 2021.
about.title: About

contact.message: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Feel free to reach out.

tasks: Technical management of video/audio signals for streaming
RESTful API integration and third-party services in frontend apps
Software evaluation, debugging, and performance improvement
Unit, functional, and non-functional test plan execution
Evolutionary and corrective maintenance of existing systems
Development aligned with technical specs and programming best practices
Web application development based on Zoho Suite
Work across different databases, backend and frontend contexts
MySQL and MongoDB database maintenance and optimization

githubDashboard.description: A single-page app built with Vue 3 + TypeScript that lets you search any GitHub username and displays a full profile dashboard: repositories, most used languages (donut chart), recent activity, and stats.
githubDashboard.name: GitHub Dashboard
githubDashboard.tech: Vue 3, TypeScript, Axios, Chart.js, SCSS, GitHub REST API

portfolio.description: The portfolio you are currently viewing. Built with Angular + TypeScript, featuring dark/light mode, EN/ES i18n, smooth scroll, and responsive design.
portfolio.name: Personal Portfolio
